case_title: ROBERTO RAMIRO ALFARO NOLAZCO VS. JIAYI XIE et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO NOLAZCO, ROBERTO RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, YONGQIANG
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO YONGQIANG CHEN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-12-2014 AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALFARO NOLAZCO, ROBERTO RAMIRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XIE, JIAYI AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT YONGQIANG CHEN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALFARO NOLAZCO, ROBERTO RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, JIAYI CHEN, YONGQIANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO NOLAZCO, ROBERTO RAMIRO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT YONGQIANG CHEN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---EMILIANO BOURGOIS. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALFARO NOLAZCO, ROBERTO RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, JIAYI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JAN-24-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT XIE, JIAYI
RETURN MAIL: (SC-100) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER MAILED 1/22/2014 TO DEFENDANT, YONG QIANG CHEN. ENVELOPE MARK <RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD>.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT
